notes: This file is a thin wrapper/alias layer over `omegaPullbackCoeff` (from OmegaPullbackCoeff.lean) and `dual_additivity_algebraic` (from FormalGroupAssoc.lean); most proofs are one-liners. The `D_x`/`D_x_ne_zero'` pair is dead scaffolding from a superseded D(x)-based design. No external callers of any exported declaration were found in the project.
